title: Galangal Feast Wrap
description: A flavorful wrap filled with the aromatic taste of galangal, perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Grill the galangal over medium heat until slightly charred.
In a bowl, mix the minced galangal with smoked paprika.
Warm the tortilla by wrapping it in a damp cloth and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Spread the galangal mixture evenly over the tortilla.
